key_themes: 记忆体及内存超级周期
NAV折价与子公司上市套利
aleabitoreddit.recent_shift: 近期更强调光学和玻璃基板标的的早期性，并从单纯分享过渡到实盘持有LPK、AEHR等，同时积极挖掘韩国和台湾的NAV折价机会。
representative_quotes: Etron was the most interesting so far. (DRAM, DDR4, KGD/KGDM, networking memory). 605.5% Y/Y growth is just staggering . Annualized net income, roughly 12.5x P/E.
I do think photonics and memory are the 2 top themes though, with optics being very early into the supercycle.
Sivers is the laser supplier for next gen architectures, not just CPO scale up. Pluggable, scale out CPO, scale up CPO, NPO, etc.

AI-linked stocks now represent a record 45% of the S&P 500, per YF

xiaomustock.recent_shift: 近期从关注美光、英伟达等转向重点押注海力士，强调45天内多重利好集中兑现。
representative_quotes: 存储这波不仅卡住了AI的脖子，也卡了传统电子产品的脖子。
拿住一个股票不动的时候最无聊，只能被无穷无尽的上涨暴击幼小的心灵。
美股今晚肯定大暴涨，因为spcx募资而锁定的几千亿美金才是大头。
